hero.title: The quest for excellence in treasury management.
hero.subtitle: For <1>holdings, SMEs and family offices</1>: access the finest money market and yield strategies, until now reserved for institutional investors. Daily liquidity, bank-grade security.

tobam.subtitle: Cash & Carry · FPS

security.title: Your funds are held by depositary bank BNP Paribas
security.body: Quercus never holds your capital. Your assets are segregated at <1>BNP Paribas</1> — the leading banking group in the eurozone — and remain fully protected, whatever happens to our platform.

useCases.subtitle: SMEs, start-ups, holdings, freelancers, private clients: Quercus is built for any organisation that demands more from its treasury.

segments.title: Who is it for?
segments.subtitle: A single platform, with strategies tailored to every treasury profile.

holdings.name: Holdings & Family Offices
holdings.pain: Your cash sits idle between deals. Put it to work every day.
